queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, log, level FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE match_all('error') ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT _timestamp, log, level FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE match_all('error') ORDER BY _timestamp ASC
SELECT level, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE match_all('test') AND code = 200 GROUP BY level ORDER BY level ASC

expected.note: match_all + field filter (code=200) + GROUP BY; 3 level groups

queries.sql: SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS _time, COUNT(*) AS match_count FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE match_all('request') GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate, load_factor
FROM "query_agent_test"
WHERE match_all('warehouse') AND throughput_rate > 400.0 AND facility_zone IN ('ZONE-1', 'ZONE-2')
ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC
LIMIT 10

expected.note: match_all + numeric filter + IN clause, ordered by throughput

queries.sql:
SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS match_cnt, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load
FROM "query_agent_test"
WHERE match_all('event') AND operation_mode != 'manual'
GROUP BY facility_zone
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
ORDER BY match_cnt DESC

expected.note: match_all + mode filter + GROUP BY with multiple aggregates and HAVING

queries.sql:
SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS time_block, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE match_all('warehouse')) AS warehouse_hits, COUNT(*) AS total_events, ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE match_all('warehouse')) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100.0, 2) AS hit_rate_pct
FROM "query_agent_test"
GROUP BY time_block
ORDER BY time_block ASC

expected.note: match_all FILTER in histogram with hit-rate percentage calculation

queries.sql:
SELECT _timestamp, log, pallet_id, facility_zone, sorter_model, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY _timestamp DESC) AS recency_rank
FROM "query_agent_test"
WHERE match_all('record')
ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, recency_rank ASC

expected.note: match_all with ROW_NUMBER window partitioned by zone, recency ranking

queries.sql:
SELECT 'primary_hits' AS source, _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, throughput_rate FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE match_all('warehouse') AND throughput_rate >= 500.0
UNION ALL
SELECT 'secondary_hits' AS source, _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, throughput_rate FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE match_all('event') AND throughput_rate < 500.0
ORDER BY source ASC, throughput_rate DESC
LIMIT 15

expected.note: UNION ALL of two match_all queries with different thresholds, labeled by source
